dashboard.welcome_message: Welcome back! Here is your activity summary.
dashboard.storage_remaining: You have {remaining} GB remaining out of {total} GB.
dashboard.no_recent_files: No recent files. Start syncing to see your activity here.

sync.status_up_to_date: All files are up to date

files.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
files.file_shared: File shared successfully. The link has been copied to your clipboard.

settings.changes_saved: Your settings have been saved successfully.

errors.network_error: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.
errors.permission_denied: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.file_too_large: The file is too large. Maximum file size is {max_size} MB.
errors.storage_full: Your storage is full. Please free up space or upgrade your plan.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
